texto: All the people who follow me on Twitter know my sense of humor. I sometimes forget the blogosphere will give it more weight than I intended.

texto: Man's inhumanity to man is as old as humanity itself. Some people just do evil things. Most do not. A billion people have seen 'Batman' movies over the past 20 years, and they have been entertained and inspired. One man saw it as a sick entry point for mass murder. The one is tragic. The billion are not. I choose to write for the billion.
explicacao: Citação de Kurt Sutter sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Man's inhumanity to man is as old as humanity itself. Some people just do evil things. Most do no…” articula motivacao, past, humanity em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e humanity.

texto: I'm a guy who has problems with moderation. All or nothing. Binge and purge. Kill or be killed. Gray is not a color I wear well. I should be dead. I know that. I should not be successful. I know that too. My daily existence is a toss of the coin - one side, fear, the other side, gratitude.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Kurt Sutter sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “I'm a guy who has problems with moderation. All or nothing. Binge and purge. Kill or be killed. G…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, gratitude, daily, útil em momentos de daily e color.
